title: The Hill Difficulty
subtitle: The road that costs more because it is true
subtitle_zh: 真实的路常更艰难，也更值得走
intro: Three ways open from the same ground. Two flatter your tired legs; one tells you the truth by being steep.
The easy roads do not announce their ruin. They simply ask you to prefer comfort over obedience, one step at a time.
Take the hard way with a humble heart. The climb cannot save you, but it can teach you to keep trusting.
intro_zh: 山路陡峭，旁边的捷径显得更友善、更轻省。
容易的路常用舒服开头，却用失落收尾。
真实的道路需要喘息、忍耐和顺服，却不会欺骗你。
spiritual_theme: Costly obedience, endurance, and resisting shortcuts
spiritual_theme_zh: 拒绝捷径，在艰难中学习顺服
core_mechanic: Choose the steep middle path, recognize Danger and Destruction as merciful warnings, and pass the rest arbor without surrendering watchfulness.
core_mechanic_zh: 辨认捷径的代价，沿艰难山路抵达顶端。

design.provenance: Attachment Ch5 艰难山 + bypass-path system (Skills 23-24).

seven_beats.arrival: The foot of a steep hill where three paths fork.
seven_beats.orientation: Difficulty climbs narrow and steep; Danger and Destruction spread broad and pretty; a hill chapel keeps its cross.
seven_beats.encounter: Timorous and Mistrust flee downhill, warning of lions ahead.
seven_beats.temptation: The easy bypath — why suffer the climb when a gentler road runs alongside?
seven_beats.choice: Take the steep true path / slip onto a bypath / sleep carelessly at the rest arbor.
seven_beats.consequence: The true path costs perseverance but keeps you; bypaths drain watchfulness; sleeping loses the scroll.
seven_beats.grace: Pass the chained lions by faith and reach the lights of the Palace at the summit.

chapel.verse_zh: 进入神的国，必须经历许多艰难。
chapel.verse_en: Through many tribulations we must enter the kingdom of God.
chapel.hint_zh: 不要走旁路，走窄而陡的正路。

primary_temptation.hook_zh: 走这条平缓的近路吧，何必受苦？

repentance.at: return from the bypath, pray at the hill chapel

design.stat_arc_note: Perseverance is the currency here; carelessness can lose has_scroll, gating the Palace until recovered.
